name: Admin Delete User
description: Admin-only endpoint that deletes a user. Three middleware run in order before the handler: auth-check verifies the JWT and stashes ctx.state.identity, admin-only checks the identity has the admin role and short-circuits 403 otherwise, audit-log records the action with who/what/when. Then the handler is a single deletion step. Demonstrates: stacking multiple middleware on a single trigger, and how middleware lets the workflow itself stay tiny — the cross-cutting concerns are factored out.
